title: Machine Learning Reveals a Mammary Tumor-Associated Multi-Ion Signature and Its Detectability Across Biological Samples — analysis code
description: Animal-level (leave-one-animal-out), leakage-free analysis code, result tables and figures for the ToF-SIMS breast-cancer classification study in the MMTV-PyMT mouse model. Accompanies the article by Manaprasertsak et al.
